remedies.name: Syzygium Jambolanum
remedies.note: Most perfect medicine for diabetes; reduces sugar in urine (Boericke).

remedies.name: Acidum Phosphoricum
remedies.note: Given as Acid Phos 6 + Uranium Nitricum 6.

remedies.name: Uranium Nitricum
remedies.note: With Acid Phos 6. K.M: markedly reduces sugar in the urine.

raw_text: Diabetes. Syzygium Jambolanum is the most perfect medicine for diabetes. Dr. Boericke: no other remedy causes in so marked a degree the diminution and disappearance of sugar in the urine. Acid Phos 6 + Uranium Nitricum 6. K.M: same claim.

remedies.name: Acidum Aceticum
remedies.note: Polyuria (बहुमूत्र) and abdominal disease; anaemia, pale face, insect bites, moles/warts, foot ailments.

remedies.name: Arsenicum Bromatum
remedies.note: Skin disease and polyuria in pale/anaemic constitutions.

raw_text: Acid Aceticum - famous for polyuria (बहुमूत्र) and abdominal disease; anaemia, face turning white, insect bites, moles/warts, foot diseases. Acid Lacticum - excessive urine, extreme constipation. Ars Brom - skin disease and polyuria in pale/anaemic constitutions.

remedies.name: Sepia / Murex
remedies.note: Yellow discharge, foul smell, itching and burning.

remedies.name: Kreosotum
remedies.note: Discharge after menses stop; yellow, stains clothes, foul smell, itching & burning on contact.

remedies.name: Acidum Phosphoricum
remedies.note: Great weakness from white discharge / spermatorrhoea.

raw_text: Yellow discharge, foul smell, itching and burning - Sepia / Murex. Discharge begins when menses stop, yellow, stains clothes, foul smell, itching & burning on skin - Kreosotum. Acid Phos - great weakness from white discharge / spermatorrhoea. If leucorrhoea causes abortion - Electricus femineusia[?]. Graphites, Arum mur, Nat mur, Agaricus Muscarius (discharge with extreme itching).

remedies.name: Chelidonium
remedies.note: 10 drops three times a day, for weakness.

remedies.name: China
remedies.note: With Myrica; liver and mucous membranes.

remedies.name: Astacus Fluviatilis
remedies.note: Skin symptoms, urticaria, neck gland swelling, jaundice.

raw_text: Jaundice, difficult enlargement of liver, gallstones. Natrum Sulphuricum 6x (bio-chemic). Chelidonium Q - 10 drops three times a day for weakness. China 6, Myrica (liver, mucous membranes). Stitching pain in liver - Oxalicum Acidum. Liver weakness - Berberis Aquifolium Q. Astacus Fluviatilis - skin symptoms, urticaria, neck gland swelling, jaundice. Carlsbad 6 - liver action. Carduus Marianus - liver disease in alcoholics. Chionanthus - jaundice and constipation.

Increase above normal number of eosinophils in circulating blood or tissue. Patient takes a deep breath resembling a long sigh; laboured inspiration; chest constricted; aggravation in daytime. Lachesis is a sure cure. Desire to escape in fever - Opium; in hysteria - Belladonna, Veratrum.

remedies.name: Argentum Nitricum
remedies.note: Specific for examination funk / terror of anticipation.

remedies.name: Lycopodium
remedies.note: Depression about passing exams; brain fog.

raw_text: In students - Anacardium. Specific for examination funk / terror - Argentum Nitricum, Gelsemium. Nervousness / weak heart - Silicea, Lycopodium (for brain fog).

remedies.name: Mercurius Corrosivus
remedies.note: Hot bloody slimy offensive stool with cutting pains; simultaneous urging of bladder and rectum.

remedies.name: Terminalia Chebula (Haritaki / हरड़)
remedies.note: Bleeding piles, diarrhoea, chronic dysentery, constipation.

raw_text: Stool hot, bloody, slimy (muddy), offensive with cutting pains; urging of bladder and rectum at the same time - Merc Cor. Terminalia Chebula (बवासीर, piles) - bleeding piles, diarrhoea, chronic dysentery, constipation, etc.

remedies.name: Thuja
remedies.note: Specific; every week, later once a month.

remedies.name: Berberis (tincture)
remedies.note: 10 drops in warm water every three hours.

raw_text: Thuja - 1M dilution every week, later once a month. Berberis tincture - 10 drops in warm water every three hours. Dr. Ghosh: B Coli in 20th or 30th potency; Methylene blue in 6th potency.

remedies.name: Radium Bromatum
remedies.note: Once a week; do not give Thuja on that day.

raw_text: Thuja mother tincture applied externally morning and evening. Radium Brome once a week (do not give Thuja that day). Vaccininum 200 once a fortnight.

remedies.name: Natrum Muriaticum
remedies.note: Three doses on first 3 days after menses end; repeat each cycle while conception not desired.

remedies.name: Pulsatilla
remedies.note: Four days continuously before the expected date of menstruation.

remedies.name: Testis
remedies.note: Dr. Banerjee: 3 grains twice daily for 7 days from cessation of menses.

remedies.name: Cyclamen
remedies.note: 5 drops for 7-10 days after menses; prevents conception.

raw_text: A. Three doses of Nat. m. 200 on the first three days after the monthly course ends. B. Puls 200 taken four days continuously before the expected date of menses. C. Dr. Banerjee: Testis 3x (3 grains twice daily for 7 days), Cyclamen mother tincture.
Hair loss - Arsenic alb 1M, Sulphur 1M, Sepia 1M, Nat mur 1M, Thuja 1M. Hair falling from the centre (डुनकी) - Causticum 1M, Equisetum 30, Vinca minor. Falling hair - Acid phos 30, Selenium 30.

Dribbling urine - Sulphur 200, Sepia 200, Nat mur 200 (once a month). Daily use - Vinca 30, Selenium 30, Phosphorus 200. Difficult urination - Cascara Sagrada Mixture. Berberis Q, Damiana Q, Frangula Q, Ceanothus Q.

remedies.name: Agnus Castus
remedies.note: Impotence, cold/shrunken organs, loss of desire in both sexes.

raw_text: Argentum Nit, Titanium 30, Carbonium Sulph, Anacardium 12, Onosmodium, Agnus Castus / Causticum. Agnus acts for impotence, cold/shrunken organs, and loss of desire in both sexes.

remedies.name: Conium Maculatum
remedies.note: Weakness after intense desire but inability to perform; effects of suppressed desire.

raw_text: Kali Brom, Cantharis, Mygale Lasiodora, Sulphur, Agaricus, Cedron. Conium maculatum - weakness after intense desire but inability to perform; mental effects of suppressed desire.
Hypericum (fingers/toes), Calc Carb (eczema on head), Kanchliria[?] (dandruff), Kilmetis[?] (neck skin), Alumina (itching until bleeding), Mezereum (thick crusts on head).

remedies.name: Carica Papaya
remedies.note: Cannot digest even a little food.

raw_text: Acid Fluor - bloating and pain. Carica Papaya - cannot digest even a little food. Ferrum Cyan - burning and bloating. Kreosotum - vomiting long after eating.

remedies.name: Berberis Vulgaris
remedies.note: Left kidney stone; 10 drops every 4 hours.

raw_text: Left kidney stone - Berberis Vulgaris M.T. (10 drops every 4 hours). Right kidney stone - Lycopodium 30. Gallstones - Cholesterinum, Calc Carb. General kidney trouble - Benzoicum Acid.
Injury - Artemisia Vulgaris. Paralysis - Carboneum Oxygenisatum 8-30. Watery eyes / eyelid twitching - Refenus[?], Sabadilla 30. Throat/mouth ulcers - Phytolacca.
Pain/pus - Calcarea Sulph, Kali Bichrom, Tellurium, Silicea. Foul pus - Arum mur 6, Psorinum. Dizziness from ear issues - Chenopodium. Eardrum inflammation - Belladonna.
Bone pain at night - Mezereum, Hecla Lava, Fluoricum Acid. Morning bone pain / fatigue - Cobaltum.
High BP - Sparteinum 1x, Rauwolfia Q, Glonoine 2x, Crataegus Q, Passiflora Q. Low BP - Physostigma, Arsenic 30, Camphor.
Terminalia Arjuna - organic and functional heart disease. Digitalis 30 - fast pulse. Kali Phos 30x - general heart problems. Aspidosperma Q, Convallaria Majalis.
Rauwolfia Serpentina Q - immediate relief. Sparteinum 1x - gradual decrease. Allium Sativum - reduces BP within 30-45 minutes.
Chininum Sulph, Lachesis, Macrotinum (Cimicifuga), Ranunculus, Cocculus. Kali Bichromicum - dizziness, nausea, yellow discharge.
Elephantiasis (हाथी पाँव) - Hydrocotyle Asiatica Q, Calotropis. Hydrocele - Calc Fluor, Arum mur, Spongia 3x. Piles (बवासीर) - Aegle Marmelos, Terminalia Chebula, Aesculus Hippocastanum Q.
Rickets (सूखा रोग) - Abrotanum, Calcarea Silicata, Iodium. Epilepsy (मृगी रोग) - Bufo, Borax, Absinthium, Amyl Nitrosum.
Sprain (मोच) - Agnus Castus, Bellis Perennis. Palpitations (धड़कन) - Amyl Nitrosum, Cactus Grandiflorus, Coffea Cruda, Convallaria Majalis.
Nose - Natrum Carbonicum (red nose), Borax (crusts), Cactus (bleeding). Urine - Cannabis Sativa (retention), Chimaphila (white sediment), Lycopodium (night frequency).
Alfalfa Tonic - quick restoration of health. Ashoka Tonic - menstrual disorders. Babyplex - child growth, appetite, rickets. Calcintone - calcium for babies.
Fernatone - painful/stopped menstruation, anaemia. Gastrine - hyperacidity, indigestion, gas.
Homezyne - digestive tonic. Koflex - coughs. Kalmegh - liver and jaundice. Levertone - liver and spleen enlargement.

remedies.name: Mesolin
remedies.note: Menstrual issues. Caution: may cause abortion during pregnancy.

raw_text: Mesolin - menstrual issues (may cause abortion during pregnancy). Vitolin - weakness and anaemia.

remedies.name: Mensolex
remedies.note: One spoon every half hour x3, with warm water, for 3 days to restart menses.

raw_text: Mensolex: one spoon every half hour, 3 times, with warm water, for 3 days to restart menses.
Oxalicum Acidum, Calc Fluor, Ginseng, Calc Carb, Agaricus Muscarius, Guaiacum. Bone pain - Aurum Met, Colchicinum.
Eyes - Euphrasia (watery), Calc Fluor (cataracts), Cineraria (cataracts). High BP - Crataegus Q, Rauwolfia, Glonoine, Baryta Mur.
Recipes for polishing wood using spirit, ramras, etc. Not a medical entry.
Calendula Officinalis - sores that won't heal, and warts.
Momordica Balsamina Q, Calc Carb, Calc Phos, Kreosotum, Cocculus, Collinsonia.
Insomnia - Myrica, Cannabis Indica. Asthma (दमा) - Naja Tripudians 30, Passiflora, Aralia Racemosa, Blatta Orientalis, Kali Iod.
Cold - Arundo, Penthorum, Bacillinum. Paralysis (लकवा) - Causticum, Gelsemium, Cadmium Sulph, Rhus Tox, Lathyrus.
Stomach - Acid Aceticum, Cadmium Sulph. General - Carcinosin. Uterus - Caltha Palustris Q, Cinnamomum. Breast - Scirrhinum. Glands - Galium Aparine.
Skin - Ambra Grisea, Calc Phos. Rheumatism (गठिया) - Radium Brom, Ledum Pal, Syphilinum, Urtica Urens, Colchicum.
Lithium Carb, Ammonium Phosphoricum, Actaea Spicata, Benzoic Acid, Colchicum.
Berberis Vulgaris Q, Acid Benz. Tumour - B. Carb[?], B. Mur[?].
Cocaine - feeling of insects on skin. Codeinum - body tremors. Raphanus - eyelid twitching.

Snoring - Opium / Calc Carb. Heel pain - Antim Crud. Appendix - see p.102. Malaria - Chininum Sulph. Typhoid - Bacillinum, Tuberculinum.

Calc Carb, Clematis Erecta, Cobaltum.
Calcarea Calcinata[?].
Causticum 1M, Lachesis 1M, Hypericum 1M, Colocynth 200, Viscum Album 200, Ledum Pal 200.
Chionanthus (wisdom tooth), Calcarea Renalis (pyorrhoea), Clematis (toothache at night), Phytolacca (teething in children).
Carbonium Sulph (ringing, deafness), Chamomilla (earache), Apis (external inflammation), Salicylicum Acidum (dizziness with ringing).
Carlsbad, Calc Carb, Phytolacca Berry, Graphites, Fucus Vesiculosus, Thyroidinum.
Shoulder pain - Chelidonium, Ranunculus, Chenopodium Anthelminticum, Acid Lactic. Hair fall mix - Acid Phos 6x, Jaborandi 3x, Lycopodium 3x, Wiesbaden 3x.
Mercurius Corrosivus (burning), Benzoicum Acidum (foul smell), Calcarea Renalis (kidney stones), Cannabis Indica.
Chionanthus, Coccinella, Nat mur, Mag Phos, Spigelia, Sanguinaria, Stramonium 30.
Iris Tenax 200, Mag Phos 30, Nux, Bryonia, Lachesis.
Surgery - Arnica 200, Calendula 200, Hypericum 200, Staphysagria 30. High BP - Crataegus Q, Rauwolfia, Glonoine, Baryta Mur.
Nat mur, Nux, Hepar Sulph, Puls, Silicea.
Vastu: north-east should be slanting. Herbal: boil 200g water with herbal mix (Markoya) until 50g remains.
Diabetes herbal recipe: Neem, Karela, Sadabahar, Bel leaves with black pepper and salt.
Uterus tumour - Kali Iod 200, Phosphorus, Arum mur 3x. Uterus enlargement - Fraxinus Americana Q, Scrophularia Nodosa 200, Thuja 10M, Calc Fluor 12x.
Piles - Ferrum Phos + Calc Sulph. Motion sickness - Petroleum 30. Stomach ulcer - Argentum Nit. Epilepsy - Bufo 200, Borax.
Printed pamphlet: Dr. Schussler's Biochemic therapy (12 tissue salts). Lists 28 biochemic compounds for ailments like anaemia, asthma, colic, cough, diabetes, fever, piles, etc.

Newspaper clipping: 'मोटापा (ओबेसिटी) के लिए रामबाण होमियोपैथ' (Homeopathy as a panacea for obesity). Medicines mentioned: Calotropis, Fucus Vesiculosus, Phytolacca Berry, Thyroidinum, Cortisone, Calcarea Carb, Capsicum.
Arnica 200 (2-4 drops morning & evening), Phytolacca 200 (afternoon), Lycopodium 200 (night).

remedies.name: Sabal Serrulata
remedies.note: Mix with Chimaphila Q; 15 drops morning & evening.

raw_text: Lycopodium 30 (morning 2-3 drops), Baryta Carb 30 (afternoon), Conium Mac 30 (evening) daily. Plus Sabal Serrulata Q + Chimaphila Q mix, 15 drops morning & evening.

condition: Child's delayed speech (बच्चे का देर से बोलना)
raw_text: Baryta Carb 30 (morning), Calc Carb 30 (evening), Kali Phos 6x (4 tablets three times daily).
Valeriana Officinalis Q: 10 drops morning, afternoon, night.

remedies.note: 4 tablets in lukewarm water, three times daily.

raw_text: Ferrum Iod 30x: 4 tablets in half a cup of lukewarm water, morning, afternoon, evening.

remedies.name: Echinacea
remedies.note: One dose after three hours / daily.

Berberis? Q ('Bergeskus texas'): 10 drops in half a cup of water, morning & evening.
Rhus Aromatica Q: 15 drops morning & evening.
Lemna Minor 30.
Ginkgo Biloba.
Cactus Q + Crataegus Q + Arnica Q + Arjuna Q mixed; 10 drops in half a cup of water, morning, afternoon, night.
Warts - Causticum 200 (morning & evening). Corn - Antim Crud 200, Thuja 200 (morning & evening).

Yerba Santa Q (asthma), Blatta Orientalis (breathlessness).
Plumbum Met 1M: 3-4 drops every four days.

Onosmodium 6 (10 drops morning & evening), Conium M 30, Titanium 200 (2-3 drops morning & evening).

remedies.name: Valeriana Officinalis
remedies.note: Hysteria, nerve disorders, spasms, nervous weakness, muscle pain.

raw_text: Valeriana Officinalis Q.
Viburnum Opulus Q (10 drops morning & night), Janosia Ashoka Q (10 drops morning & night). Pain: Senecio Aur 6.
Codeinum 30 & Zincum Met 30 alternating every 4 hours. Stramonium 200 (morning & evening). Gelsemium 6 (10 drops three times).
Spirulina Q (10 drops morning & evening), Ginkgo Biloba Q (10 drops).
Benzoicum Acidum 30 (morning), Ledum P 30 (afternoon), Colchicum 30 (night). Urtica Urens Q (15 drops in water morning & evening).
Arnica Q + Ginkgo Biloba Q + Hypericum Q mix: 10 drops three times in water.
Formica Rufa Q (Acidum Formicum).
Baryta Carb 200 (morning), Baryta Iod 200 (night): 2-3 drops.
Santoninum 30.

condition: Hair weakness / dead skin / wrinkles / freckles

remedies.name: Rosmarinus Officinalis
remedies.note: Topical in coconut oil; also 30 potency internally.

raw_text: Rosmarinus Off Q: in 100ml coconut oil, apply to roots at night, wash in morning; also 30 potency 3-4 drops three times daily.
Ferrum Met 30 + China 30 + Phosphorus 30 mix (morning & evening), Ferrum Phos 6x (4 tablets every 4 hours).
Berberis Q + Alserum 7x + Urtica Urens Q + Solidago Q mix (10 drops morning & evening). Wheezal Renal Drops (15 drops three times).
Guaiacum 200 + Arnica 200 + Ruta 200 + Rhus Tox 200 mix: 3-4 drops three times daily.
Argentum Nit 30: 3 doses every 15 minutes.
Thlaspi Bursa Pastoris.
Lycopodium 1M (1-2 drops once a week), Chelidonium Q (20 drops in water three times).
Left side: Arnica 200 (morning), Lachesis 30 (afternoon/night) for 3 months, Gelsemium 6 (10 drops three times), Bothrops L 200 (if speech and body halted).
Phosphorus 30 + Nat Mur 30 + Jaborandi 30: 2 drops of each in a tablespoon of water.

condition: Gonorrhoea / typhoid / piles / ulcer / migraine / whooping cough

remedies.name: Ficus Religiosa
remedies.note: With Ficus Indica; 15 drops three times.

raw_text: Ficus Religiosa Q + Ficus Indica Q mix: 15 drops three times in water.
Oophorinum 30 (4 drops morning & evening). Right side cyst/pain: Apis M 30 & Palladium 30.
Selenium 30.
Janosia Ashoka Q & Gossypium H Q alternately: 10 drops each.
Nat Mur 30, Dulcamara.

condition: Heel pain / bone spur (एड़ी में दर्द)

remedies.name: Ruta
remedies.note: Bone spur; 3 hours after Calc Fluor.

raw_text: Arnica 30 + Calc Fluor 30 (+ 'Arenia did' 30). Bone spur: Calcarea Fluor 200 (morning), Ruta G 30 (3 hrs later), Phytolacca 30 (three times daily).
Kali Bichrom 30 & Spongia 30 alternately. Dry cough: Antim Tart 30, Bryonia 30, Spongia 30 alternately every 2 hours.
Blatta Orientalis Q + Aspidosperma Q: 10 drops three times.
Osteoarthritis nosode 200 (3-4 drops once a week). Arnica + Guaiacum + Ruta + Rhus Tox 200 mix (4-5 drops daily). Shifting pain: Stellaria Media 30.
Hypericum 30 (morning & evening), Acid Phos Q or 6 (20 drops in water morning & evening), Kali Phos 6x alongside.
Gelsemium 30 & Causticum 30 alternately 3 times. Squilla Maritima Q (15 drops morning & evening). Litrius spicata Q (swelling, frequent urination). Rhus Aromatica 30 (bedwetting).
